ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charity_categories" (
  "charity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charity */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charity_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donations" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation */,
  "charity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charity receiving the donation */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor making the donation */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the donation */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date the donation was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "donation_type" TEXT /* Type of donation (e.g., one-time, recurring) */,
  "recurring_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of recurring donations (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "next_donation_date" TEXT /* Date of the next recurring donation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the donation (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment gateway used for the donation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donors" (
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the donor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the donor */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone number of the donor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the donor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the donor */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the donor is subscribed to newsletters */,
  "donation_history_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor's donation history (for tracking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateways" (
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the payment gateway */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the payment gateway is currently active */,
  "last_tested_date" TEXT /* Date the gateway was last tested for functionality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateway_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment gateway */,
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donation */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message describing the transaction */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique ID of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_gateway_logs_donation_id FOREIGN KEY ("donation_id") REFERENCES donations ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_gateway_logs_gateway_id FOREIGN KEY ("gateway_id") REFERENCES payment_gateways ("gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, donor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is currently active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "charity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charity */,
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donation */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., website traffic, donation amount) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., website, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_donation_id FOREIGN KEY ("donation_id") REFERENCES donations ("donation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "newsletters" (
  "newsletter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each newsletter */,
  "charity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charity */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the newsletter */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the newsletter */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date the newsletter was sent */,
  "is_sent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the newsletter has been sent */,
  "sent_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the newsletter */,
  "recipient_list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient list */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("newsletter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_newsletters_sent_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
